widgets.title: Batch Size Distribution by Production Line Name
widgets.description: Shows the proportion of total batch sizes grouped by production line name.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "production_line_name" AS label, CAST(SUM("batch_size") AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_manufacturing_defects" GROUP BY "production_line_name" ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 8

widgets.title: Product Family × Production Line Name Heatmap
widgets.description: Heatmap showing average defect rate (ppm) by product family and production line name.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "product_family" AS row, "production_line_name" AS col, CAST(AVG(try_cast("defect_rate_ppm" AS DOUBLE)) AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_manufacturing_defects" GROUP BY "product_family", "production_line_name" ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 400

widgets.title: Batch Size vs Measurement Value Correlation
widgets.description: Scatter plot showing correlation between batch size and measurement value for manufacturing defects.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "lot_number" AS "col1", CAST("batch_size" AS DOUBLE) AS "x", "measurement_value" AS "y" FROM "t_manufacturing_defects" WHERE "batch_size" IS NOT NULL AND "measurement_value" IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1000

widgets.title: Batch Size vs Measurement Value by Product Family
widgets.description: Compare average batch size and average measurement value for each product family.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "product_family" AS label, CAST(AVG("batch_size") AS DOUBLE) AS value1, AVG("measurement_value") AS value2 FROM "t_manufacturing_defects" GROUP BY "product_family" ORDER BY (value1 + value2) DESC LIMIT 20

widgets.title: Product Family Composition by Production Line Name
widgets.description: Stacked bar chart showing the distribution of defects found per product family across different production line names.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "product_family" AS label, "production_line_name" AS "group", CAST(SUM("defects_found") AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_manufacturing_defects" GROUP BY label, "group" ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 25

widgets.title: Total Cost Usd Proportion by Product Family
widgets.description: Treemap showing the proportion of total manufacturing defect costs in USD by product family.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "product_family" AS label, CAST(SUM("total_cost_usd") AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_manufacturing_defects" GROUP BY "product_family" ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 20

widgets.title: Product Family Ranked by Measurement Value
widgets.description: Average measurement value per product family, ranked descending.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "product_family" AS label, AVG("measurement_value") AS value FROM "t_manufacturing_defects" GROUP BY "product_family" ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 25

widgets.title: Multi-Metric Profile by Product Family
widgets.description: Comparison of average defect rate (ppm), average yield percentage, average first pass yield percentage, and average total cost (USD) across product families.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "product_family" AS axis, CAST(AVG("defect_rate_ppm") AS DOUBLE) AS "value" FROM "t_manufacturing_defects" GROUP BY "product_family" ORDER BY "value" DESC LIMIT 12

widgets.title: Data Overview Table
widgets.description: Overview of manufacturing defects with key metrics and classifications.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "lot_number", "part_number", "serial_number", "product_family", "production_line_name", "workstation", "shift", "detected_at", CAST("batch_size" AS DOUBLE) AS "batch_size", CAST("defects_found" AS DOUBLE) AS "defects_found", CAST("defect_rate_ppm" AS DOUBLE) AS "defect_rate_ppm", "yield_pct", "first_pass_yield_pct", "defect_code", "defect_category", "defect_severity", "root_cause", "root_cause_category", "detection_method", "measurement_value", "spec_min", "spec_max", "cp", "cpk", "rework_cost_usd", "scrap_cost_usd", "total_cost_usd", "disposition", CAST("resolution_hours" AS DOUBLE) AS "resolution_hours", "resolved", "supplier_code", "iso_9001_nonconformance" FROM "t_manufacturing_defects" LIMIT 20
